import axios from'axios';const API_URL='http://localhost:8000/api';const api=axios.create({baseURL:API_URL,headers:{'Content-Type':'application/json'}});// Add token to requests
api.interceptors.request.use(config=>{const token=localStorage.getItem('auth_token');if(token){config.headers.Authorization=`Bearer ${token}`;}return config;});export default api;
